'''baboro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niblet|niblet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niblet|niblet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| baboro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæbereth|bæbereth]] || [[word:bæberej|bæberej]] || [[word:bæberesh|bæberesh]] || [[word:bæbere|bæbere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:baboboroth|baboboroth]] || [[word:baboboroj|baboboroj]] || [[word:baboborosh|baboborosh]] || [[word:baboboro|baboboro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:baboroth|baboroth]] || [[word:baboroj|baboroj]] || [[word:baborosh|baborosh]] || [[word:baboro|baboro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:babofroth|babofroth]] || [[word:babofroj|babofroj]] || [[word:babofrosh|babofrosh]] || [[word:babofrof|babofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:baborotho|baborotho]] || [[word:baborojo|baborojo]] || [[word:baborosho|baborosho]] || [[word:baboroko|baboroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:baboroth|baboroth]] || [[word:baboroj|baboroj]] || [[word:baborosh|baborosh]] || [[word:baboro|baboro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:baborothol|baborothol]] || [[word:baborojol|baborojol]] || [[word:baboroshol|baboroshol]] || [[word:baborokol|baborokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:baborothotho|baborothotho]] || [[word:baborojojo|baborojojo]] || [[word:baboroshosho|baboroshosho]] || [[word:baboroko|baboroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:baborothon|baborothon]] || [[word:baborojon|baborojon]] || [[word:baboroshon|baboroshon]] || [[word:baborokon|baborokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:baborothoro|baborothoro]] || [[word:baborojoro|baborojoro]] || [[word:baboroshoro|baboroshoro]] || [[word:baborokoro|baborokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
